channel.title: ubuntu on Mohammad Aziz
channel.description: Recent content in ubuntu on Mohammad Aziz

item.title: Self-hosted: WireGuard VPN Server on Ubuntu, with MacOS and Android Clients
item.description: WireGuard is a modern, high-performance VPN designed to be easy to use while providing robust security. This guide will walk you through the steps to set up a WireGuard VPN server on Ubuntu, and connect to it using MacOS and Android clients. Setting up the WireGuard VPN Server Install WireGuard on your Ubuntu server: sudo add-apt-repository ppa:wireguard/wireguard sudo apt-get update sudo apt-get install wireguard Generate the server keys: umask 077 wg genkey | tee /etc/wireguard/privatekey | wg pubkey > /etc/wireguard/publickey Configure the VPN in /etc/wireguard/wg0.
